insurance (OASI) 
1 = Disability insurance benefits (DIB) 
2 = End-stage renal disease (ESRD) 
3 = Both DIB and ESRD 
4 = Beneficiary insured due to Part B Immunosuppressive Drug (PBID) 

COMMENT: This variable indicates how the beneficiary currently qualifies for Medicare. The current reason for 
entitlement can differ from the original reason that a beneficiary qualified for Medicare (reference the 
ENTLMT_RSN_ORIG variable). CMS obtains this information from the Social Security
